title: DiscoverShowOutput
description: Output of 'discover show'. Emitted to stdout as a single JSON line. Reads all metadata from catalog files; AST parsing only for statement breakdown on deterministic procedures.

name.description: Normalized fully-qualified name: schema.name (lowercase, no brackets).

raw_ddl.description: Raw DDL text as extracted from the .sql file.

columns.description: Column definitions from catalog. Populated for tables; empty for other types.

params.description: Procedure parameters from catalog. Populated for procedures; empty for other types.

refs.description: References from catalog. null if catalog file has no references section.

statements.description: Per-statement breakdown with action classification. Populated for deterministic procedures; null for claude_assisted or non-procedures.

classification.description: deterministic: refs and statements are complete. claude_assisted: statements is null, read raw_ddl. null for non-procedure types.

parse_error.description: Error message if sqlglot could not parse the body; null otherwise.

sql_type.description: SQL type string, e.g. NVARCHAR(50), BIGINT.

proc_refs.description: Reference extraction result for procedures (from catalog).

reads_from.description: Normalized FQNs of tables/views read by this procedure (is_selected=true).

writes_to.description: Normalized FQNs of tables written by this procedure (is_updated=true).

write_operations.description: Map of target FQN to detected DML operations from catalog flags.

uses_functions.description: Normalized FQNs of scalar/table-valued functions called.

basic_refs.description: Reference extraction result for views and functions (no write tracking).

type.description: sqlglot AST node class name, e.g. Insert, Update, Command.

action.description: migrate: core DML that becomes the dbt model. skip: operational overhead dbt ignores. claude: needs LLM to follow call graph.

sql.description: SQL text of the statement (truncated to 200 chars).
